description: issue #208: `set_color "reddish"` is not one of the three accepted color forms (an unknown palette word), so it raises `ol-bad-color` (spec/error-model.md:122) instead of emitting a `color-change` event.

diagnostics.message: set_color needs a color word, an [r g b] list, or a "#rrggbb" hex word, but got reddish.
